sections.paragraph:
ταχύνω fut. 3 sg. ταχυνεῖ Gen 41:32; aor. ἐτάχυνα LXX, almost always intr. (Aeschyl., X. et al.; LXX; PsSol 17:45) hasten, hurry combined w. another verb by means of καί hasten to do someth. (Judg 13:10) B 4:3.—DELG s.v. ταχύς.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

intr. intr. = intransitive

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PsSol PsSol = Psalms of Solomon—List 2

someth. someth. = something

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 993
